title: cyperus elatus
intro: Cyperus elatus, also known as umbrella sedge, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. It is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications like creams and ointments.
